subject: Re: Bedford customs

Bedford Customs is only availible on weekends ondemad basis, drop in is not possible.           
Flight time is 7+56min (headwind is -38kts). Weather is good, nonstop is good possibility, 
Is Bangor Maine ok for fuel stop if needed?
